title: Radio Group
description: Mutually exclusive selection. Prefer native <fieldset> + <legend> + <input type="radio">.

states.name: selected
effects: Show filled indicator; keep contrast in both themes.

states.name: focus-visible
states.description: Keyboard focus indicator on an option.
effects: Show focus ring using semantic border focus token.

keyboard: Arrow keys move selection within the group (native radio behavior in many browsers).
Tab focuses the selected radio or first radio.
aria: Use <fieldset> + <legend> for group labeling whenever possible.
If non-native, use role="radiogroup" and role="radio" with aria-checked.

must: Group must have an accessible label (legend or aria-labelledby).
Exactly one option can be selected at a time.
should: Use radio group when options are visible; use select when many options exist.
must_not: Do not use radio group for multiple selections (use checkbox group).

token_usage.notes: Default border; on focus use semantic.color.border.focus.

examples.title: Plain HTML reference
examples.html: <fieldset><legend>Plan</legend><label><input type="radio" name="plan" value="basic" /> Basic</label><label><input type="radio" name="plan" value="pro" /> Pro</label></fieldset>
